name: WF_SCOUT — Daily Research & KB Update
description: Scout agent: daily 07:00 research run — market intel, tech updates, competitor watch. Writes to services/research/feeds/ and alerts Jeff on HIGH relevance findings.

parameters.value: ={ "model": "ollama/qwen2.5:3b", "messages": [{ "role": "system", "content": "You are Scout, the Research Intelligence Agent for COPREM OS. Your job: research and summarize today's most relevant updates for a Thai e-commerce/beauty brand business. Focus: (1) Thailand beauty/haircare market news (2) TikTok/Shopee/social commerce updates (3) AI/LLM tech news relevant to system stack (4) Competitor brand activity. Output JSON array of findings, each with: topic, summary, source, relevance (HIGH/MED/LOW), impact_on_coprem, action_required (boolean)." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Today is {{ $now.format('YYYY-MM-DD') }}. Research and return today's findings as JSON array." }], "max_tokens": 2000 } }
